description: The winning team in the final.
The losing team in the final.
The prize will be split between winner and runner-up if there are no penalty shoot-outs.
Fewest goals scored will decide in the event of more than one team being eliminated at the same time.
Most yellow cards will decide in the event of more than one team finishing with an equal number of cards.
Excluding penalty shoot-outs and fewest games played will decide in the event of more than one team finishing with an equal number of goals conceded.
